## Tasks.ITaskInvocation type

A task invocation - either a reference to a library task or an inline task definition. Discriminated by the presence of `task` (inline) vs `taskId` (ref).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ITaskInvocation = IInlineTask | ITaskRef;
```
**References:** [IInlineTask](./ts-chocolate.tasks.iinlinetask.md)<!-- -->, [ITaskRef](./ts-chocolate.tasks.itaskref.md)
